label: Animation
description: Defines a pawn render animation: a timed sequence of keyframe or curve parts applied to named pawn render nodes.

durationTicks.label: Duration ticks
durationTicks.description: Total length of the animation in game ticks. Default is 0.

startOnRandomTick.label: Start on random tick
startOnRandomTick.description: If true, the animation starts at a random tick offset instead of tick 0.

playWhenDowned.label: Play when downed
playWhenDowned.description: If true, the animation continues to play when the pawn is downed.

posRotScale.label: Pos/rot scale
posRotScale.description: Global scale applied to position and rotation animation values. Does not scale the scale channel. Default is 1.

loopMode.label: Loop mode
loopMode.description: How the animation behaves when it reaches its end. Loop repeats, Clamp holds the last frame, End stops.

keyframeParts.label: Keyframe parts
keyframeParts.description: Per-node keyframe animation parts. Each entry maps a PawnRenderNodeTagDef key to a KeyframeAnimationPart that drives that node's position, rotation, and scale over time.

curveParts.label: Curve parts
curveParts.description: Per-node curve animation parts. Each entry maps a PawnRenderNodeTagDef key to a CurveKeyAnimationPart that drives that node using AnimationCurve data.

basic-keyframe-animation.label: Basic keyframe animation
basic-keyframe-animation.description: A minimal keyframe-based animation with a 60-tick loop.
